name: Default
_comment: Clean master profile aligned with the post-2026-04-28 master scale=2 convention. Volume 64 = unity 0 dB (matches Pico initsong.cpp boot default), MakeUp 14 (+6.6 dB), default compressor settings, FX returns at unity (Reverb 64) / +2.4 dB (Delay 72). For louder/saturator character load fxmaster-hot instead. See docs/architecture/gain-staging-vs-octatrack.md § 'Master Volume convention revisit'.
